page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-30-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 30 dedicated vCPUs derived from 15 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 240.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Storage is bundled with 804 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity across two physical drives, while no GPU accelerators are included.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench text processing scoring in the top 25%. Passmark memory benchmarks also register in the top 25%, reflecting efficient memory subsystem performance. Multi-core execution, database operations, and memory bandwidth tests generally fall within the average range. Notably, small-model LLM inference demonstrates high efficiency, with text generation for a 135M model reaching top-tier status in the top 10% of tested systems.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the c3d-highmem-30-lssd offers a balanced profile for memory-intensive workloads that require fast local scratch space without the premium of dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of high memory density and local NVMe storage makes this server well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers like Redis, data processing pipelines, and text-heavy analytical workloads.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-30-lssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 30 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor and 240.0 GB of RAM. This x86_64 instance includes 804 GB of local NVMe SSD storage but lacks GPU acceleration. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU and memory performance, with stress-ng single-core and Passmark memory scores placing in the top 25%. Additionally, it achieves top-tier performance in small-model LLM text generation. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio and fast local storage make this instance highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-30-lssd is a memory-optimized server with 30 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 240 GB RAM, and 804 GB local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong single-core and memory performance.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring high-density RAM and fast local NVMe SSD storage for demanding database and analytical workloads.
bullet_points: 30 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 240 GB of system memory
804 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
Top-tier text generation speeds for small-scale LLM inference
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and text processing
